chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1422 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 20.10.2017. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith Inspector Abdul Aziz Seenhro, S.H.O P.S Samaro. Mr. Mehboob Ali Kabri, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of respondent No.6, which is taken on record. On the other hand S.H.O P.S Samaro has filed progress report and has informed that he has submitted the challan before the Trial Court i.e. Sessions Court, Umderkot, which is now seized with the trial in the said crime and offence. Learned Counsel for the petitioner after hearing the same states that he would move a proper application before the authorities concerned and the Trial Court for reinvestigation and for recovery of the detainee and seeks disposal of this petition in the said terms. This petition is disposed of accordingly in the above terms. JUDGE Ali Haider
